title: aspondos #0786
definition:
1) without a treaty or covenant
    1a) of things not mutually agreed upon
        e.g. abstinences from hostilities
 2) that cannot be persuaded to enter into a covenant, implacable

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5892\\
